                                                                                                                     To facilitate understanding, we hereby provide the following expla-
                                                                                                                     nations on some new concepts.
                                                                                                                         In this book, “Development-oriented finance” refers to a finan-
                                                                                                                     cial entity that aims to realize government objectives and promote
                                                                                                                     the sound, rapid, and sustainable development of the economy and
                                                                                                                     the society. As CDB is the innovator and practitioner of such finan-
                                                                                                                     cial entity, we treat development-oriented finance as an animate
                                                                                                                     subject and sometimes make no special distinction between it and
                                                                                                                     CDB during our narration.
                                                                                                                         The development of market credit system is an integral part of
                                                                                                                     the socialist market economy of China, and also a major focus of the
